description: Conduct prior art research for US Patent 5,255,452 ('Method and means for creating anti-gravity illusion'). Save the full patent PDF to /home/ga/Documents/Patents/US5255452.pdf. Create a summary file at /home/ga/Documents/Patents/patent_summary.txt containing the name of the first listed inventor, the filing date (YYYY-MM-DD), and the patent number of the cited document titled 'Ladder-gripping attachment for shoes'.
